Package io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.optic

package io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.optic
  • Interfaces
    Class
    Description
    Lens<S,A>
    An optic that focuses on a single mandatory field within a structure.
    Prism<S,A>
    An optic that focuses on a case or a potentially missing field.
    Traversal<S,A>
    An optic that focuses on 0 to N elements within a collection.
